summary: Create Watchpost as the brand with the source-supported Whiskey style as its distinct core expression, preserving the American blended whiskey category, 42.5% ABV, and Westland production evidence instead of duplicating Watchpost as both brand and expression.

dbOutcome.summary: Production add-bottle flow created bottle 44299 as Watchpost Watchpost with category blend, stated age 8, 42.5% ABV, and a new Westland Distillery Co. entity 365683 instead of preserving a distinct expression and reusing an existing Westland distillery candidate.

provenance.notes: Added from the exact failed image add-bottle flow and its persisted production image. The label reads Watchpost, An American Blended Whiskey, 42.5% Alc/Vol, Westland Distillery Co., and Aged 8 Years. Official Watchpost and Westland pages describe the product as an American blended whiskey made by the Westland team from eight-year-old whiskey components.
